'''Eclipse Station''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] stronghold on the [[Eclipse (Deep Core)/Legends|planet Eclipse]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was one of the results of the [[Great River]] scheme. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] threatened the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] that if they didn't reveal the location of Eclipse, they would destroy thousands of [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. The Jedi however were, with help from the New Republic, able to free the refugees.

Unfortunately, Eclipse Station's coordinates were leaked by a captured [[yammosk]] around the same time [[Anakin Solo]] fell in battle over [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]].

The station was carved out of the planet's crust and sealed against [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] with a white [[plastiform]]. Its residents wore emergency [[Environment suit/Legends|vacsuits]] as a precaution against the void.
